The spec hard-codes small finite domains (States = {"pending", "active", "done"}), so every quantifier ranges over a fixed set and the reachable state space is a finite product of those domains. The transition structure is exactly the actions named in the Next relation: Activate performs the activate transition, guarded by state = "pending"; Complete performs the complete transition, guarded by state = "active". Safety is captured by SafetyInvariant and is inductive because the only actions that can change the relevant state (Activate, Complete, Stay) each re-check the precondition before firing; Activate in particular cannot proceed unless its guard already implies the post-state still satisfies SafetyInvariant.
